mapper.sql: id, slot_code, title, image_url, target_url, label, start_at, end_at, enabled, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_ad_campaign SET slot_code = #{slotCode}, title = #{title}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, label = #{label}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM blog_ad_campaign WHERE slot_code = #{slotCode} AND enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (start_at IS NULL OR start_at <= #{now}) AND (end_at IS NULL OR end_at >= #{now}) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_ad_event (campaign_id, event_type, user_id, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) VALUES (#{campaignId}, #{eventType}, #{userId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.slot_code, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS campaign_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'IMPRESSION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS impression_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_type = 'CLICK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS click_count FROM blog_ad_campaign c LEFT JOIN blog_ad_event e ON e.campaign_id = c.id WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.slot_code ORDER BY c.slot_code
